programme.title: Abandoned: Uncovering Fukushima
programme.desc: In 2011, a catastrophic nuclear disaster forced the immediate evacuation of Fukushima, Japan; a team of scientists uses hundreds of cameras to track and investigate the astonishing wildlife that now thrives in this deadly, radioactive environment.

programme.title: Expedition Deep Ocean
programme.desc: Victor Vescovo's team takes on the Mariana Trench in the Pacific Ocean.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Deep Ocean
programme.desc: Victor Vescovo's team concludes its mission in the Arctic Ocean.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Abandoned: Uncovering Fukushima
programme.desc: In 2011, a catastrophic nuclear disaster forced the immediate evacuation of Fukushima, Japan; a team of scientists uses hundreds of cameras to track and investigate the astonishing wildlife that now thrives in this deadly, radioactive environment.

programme.title: Expedition Deep Ocean
programme.desc: Victor Vescovo and his team head to the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon
programme.desc: Archaeologists are finding hard proof of the prehistoric civilization that once thrived in the Amazon; with the help of cutting-edge technology, these new discoveries reveal how these long-lost people built an advanced society in the jungle.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles and, using cutting-edge archaeological methods, finding the reasons why the civilization fell.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A piece of the sun seems to have vanished; the Hubble spots an unidentified object traveling faster than light.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Astronaut Leroy Chiao's spacewalk is interrupted by bright lights flying past; a flying saucer is photographed from the Apollo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A distant planet shows an Earth-like atmosphere; a glowing light suggests an atmosphere on the Moon; why there are blueberries on Mars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The hidden kingdom of microscopic alien organisms shapes the universe as much as galaxies, stars, and planets; new discoveries reveal how bacteria, viruses and other micro-organisms built life on Earth and influence humanity's future in the cosmos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes a fresh look at the Battle of Actium; Jeremy investigates what could be the first recorded case of a whale rescuing a human.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade examines new evidence that could finally reveal what happened to aviator Amelia Earhart; Jeremy investigates a strange anchor found in the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores an accident involving a Russian nuclear submarine on a top-secret mission, and shocking details emerge surrounding the vessel's design; scientists investigate ancient human remains emerging from a lake in Finland.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade follows investigators as they dive the wreck of the ferry MS Estonia; the case of America's notorious skyjacker DB Cooper takes an intriguing underwater twist.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Exploring the puzzling disappearance of an Indonesian submarine; the latest research into an underwater phenomenon may help piece together how it vanished.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the infamous shipwreck of the Titanic; locals are baffled when a bag containing 54 severed human hands is found on the banks of a Siberian river.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores a shipwreck that may contain stolen Nazi treasure, the priceless lost furnishings of the 18th century Amber Room; astonishing footage captures the exact moment when freight ship MV Arvin split in two and sank in the Black Sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The ruins of a dreamlike Polish palace hide an astonishingly dark history that's shrouded in mystery to this day; experts investigate and uncover an ornate gothic structure that concealed a nightmare of Nazi experimentation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A strange sea fortress that guards icy waters is home to a grim secret; experts investigate the mysteries at this eerie structure, which fought an invisible enemy far more deadly than ever imagined.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A collection of ramshackle structures with a mystical facade lie mysteriously deserted on the tropical island of Bali; experts investigate and uncover the ruins of a bizarre amusement park complex with a disastrous past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the 10 most significant ones.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Spaceships powered by atomic bombs; artificial rings encircle an entire star; Neil Armstrong's transmission feed cuts off when he spots strange lights on the moon; how can lightning talk to itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed; the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside, and how it controls the entire galaxy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there; but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born; using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the Screaming Mummy have haunted archaeologists for decades, but experts uncover new evidence to reveal the treacherous conspiracy that led to the mummy's grisly end.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case that has brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigates fresh evidence to discover the truth behind the brutal death.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science reveals new discoveries about the mutilated mummy of a young woman with a secret link to Tutankhamun; as experts use modern-day criminal forensics to follow fresh leads, the bloody trail leads straight to the Boy King.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A brand-new discovery inside a 3,000-year-old treasure chest may lead experts to the Egyptian pharaoh who was erased from history: a woman named Hatshepsut, who was one of the most controversial and successful pharaohs of all time.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Leading scientists and Egyptologists use state-of-the-art forensics to investigate the Niagara Falls mummy and search for its true identity; how a legendary ancient Egyptian pharaoh ended up on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: The mysterious mummy of Ramesses V reveals a shocking tale of bitter family rivalry, civil insurrection and a cause of death that ultimately pushed ancient Egypt to the edge of collapse.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A strange circular forest next to a notorious cannibal site; when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device; cutting-edge tech helps experts answer these sinister mysteries.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past; when a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life; cutting-edge tech reveals new clues to these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.sub-title: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret; when a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads; a mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past; when a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life; cutting-edge tech reveals new clues to these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.sub-title: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret; when a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads; a mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.
